testcase.name: test_quotation_inside_alta_uses_season_price
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration8_packages_seasons.py:153: in test_quotation_inside_alta_uses_season_price assert r.status_code in (200, 201), r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","pax"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"client_id":"d84df0c9-04ef-4437-9ca2-0a27e35f75f4","package_id":"14d48fd3-58df-4ddc-9eb6-48cd0ed9cd06","hotel_name":"Hotel Riu Plaza Guadalajara","occupancy":"doble","adults":2,"children":0,"minors":0,"dates":{"start":"2026-12-20","end":"2026-12-23"},"services_selected":[],"extra_nights":0,"notes":"TEST_season_inside"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"model_attributes_type","loc":["body","extra_nights"],"msg":"Input should be a valid dictionary or object to extract fields from","input":0,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/model_attributes_type"}]} E assert 422 in (200, 201) E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
